title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at State Bank of India Digital Technologies
company: State Bank of India Digital Technologies

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Investment Banker at State Bank of India Digital Technologies
jsonLd.description:
State Bank of India Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Investment Banker at our Raipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About State Bank of India Digital Technologies:
State Bank of India Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in QuickBooks

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Professional development and training programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Raipur, Chhattisgarh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India Digital Technologies!
